summary: Lead review found two pre-QA issues in the M6 scenario data pipeline: manifest hash omitted claim text and competing interpretations, and empty sourcePassages entries could satisfy formal-claim source presence. Changes were routed back to the replacement historical_researcher before independent QA.

tests_run.result: PASS before lead request changes; M6 manifestHash=15f4c10c.
PASS 37 root files / 268 tests plus web 4 tests.

decisions: Do not route to QA until deterministic manifest hash covers all compiled claim-record content.
Do not accept sourcePassages containing empty strings as satisfying formal non-fictional claim source evidence.
Return fixes to the replacement historical_researcher writer rather than lead-patching silently.
risks: If not fixed, content text could drift without manifest evidence and empty passage strings could weaken historical-source safeguards.
requested_action: Fix manifest hash coverage and non-empty source passage validation, add negative/hash tests, rerun required tests, and return an R2 REVIEW handoff.
